title: ADULT LITERACY TUTORING - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY LIBRARY ADULT LITERACY TUTORING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one tutors to assist adults with GED preparation, English literacy (reading, writing, and speaking), and life skills (reading, writing, and math for daily life). Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Tutoring hours vary Email (503) 577-9984 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Adult Literacy Coordinator (503) 577-9984 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information, including class dates and times FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Literacy Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - CITIZENSHIP CLASSES EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - GED HELP EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOMEWORK CENTER INFORMATION SERVICES - EVENTS AND CLASSES INFORMATION SERVICES - MOBILE AND PARTNER LIBRARIES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - MY DISCOVERY PASS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
